<think>I found the exact information needed. In the <info> block from DOC1_A6, I can see the consolidated balance sheet with the line item "其他应付款" (other payables) showing:

|其他应付款|239,644,736.01|308,046,220.98|

This document is DOC1 which is the 2024 Q1 report for Shanghai Huafeng Ultrafine Science & Technology Co., Ltd. (华峰超纤). The question asks about "华峰超纤的其他应付款" which matches this document.

I have found the evidence I need. Let me extract the verbatim span containing this information.</think>
